revision.comment: Bot: migrate talk page structure; import discussion seed (ja:知恩院, en:Chion-in); add local discussion section + dated import note
revision.text: {{talk page header}} == Local discussion == :Dummy comment added by script to avoid immediate auto-archive of a fresh page.[[User:Immanuelle|Immanuelle]] ([[User talk:Immanuelle|talk]]) 02:59, 26 February 2026 (UTC) == Imported from Japanese Wikipedia (2026-02-26, [https://ja.wikipedia.org/wiki/Special:PermanentLink/103683478 revision]) == :Dummy comment added by script to avoid immediate auto-archive of a fresh page.[[User:Immanuelle|Immanuelle]] ([[User talk:Immanuelle|talk]]) 02:59, 26 February 2026 (UTC) {{Talkheader}} == 2006年12月 == よく参考にさせていただいており助かっています しかし数字的に迷う部分があります 知恩院の国宝の三門の高さもその一つです　知恩院のホ－ムペ－ジでは24m 当ペ－ジでは34mなどです数字の出所を教えていただきたくおもいます ヨシミズ sysy4432@ybb.ne.jp—''以上のコメントは、220.41.20.87（[[利用者‐会話:220.41.20.87|会話]]/[[特別:投稿記録/220.41.20.87|投稿記録]]/[https://whois.domaintools.com/220.41.20.87 Whois]）さんが[[特別:固定リンク/9279485|2006年12月6日 (水) 01:29 (UTC)]]に投稿したものです（[[利用者:Keruby|Keruby]]（[[利用者‐会話:Keruby|会話]]）による付記）。'' :誤記の可能性もあるので、公式サイトにあわせて「24m」と修正しました。もし「34m」にも根拠があるようでしたら、「○○から計れば34m」と併記していただければと思います。--[[利用者:Miya|miya]] 2006年12月6日 (水) 01:46 (UTC) :Dummy comment added by script to avoid immediate auto-archive of a fresh page.[[User:Immanuelle|Immanuelle]] ([[User talk:Immanuelle|talk]]) 02:59, 26 February 2026 (UTC) == 参考資料の明記を == いつも使わしていただいています。 執筆の際の参考資料はどこから出てきているのでしょうか？--[[利用者:121.82.211.37|121.82.211.37]] 2007年1月26日 (金) 15:34 (UTC)はかせ :Dummy comment added by script to avoid immediate auto-archive of a fresh page.[[User:Immanuelle|Immanuelle]] ([[User talk:Immanuelle|talk]]) 02:59, 26 February 2026 (UTC) == Imported from English Wikipedia (2026-02-26, [https://en.wikipedia.org/wiki/Special:PermanentLink/1206666309 revision]) == :Dummy comment added by script to avoid immediate auto-archive of a fresh page.[[User:Immanuelle|Immanuelle]] ([[User talk:Immanuelle|talk]]) 02:59, 26 February 2026 (UTC) {{WikiProject banner shell|class=Start|1= {{WikiProject Buddhism|importance=low}} {{WikiProject Japan|importance=high|religion=y}} {{WikiProject Architecture|importance=mid}} }} ==Wiki Education Foundation-supported course assignment== [[File:Sciences humaines.svg|40px]] This article was the subject of a Wiki Education Foundation-supported course assignment, between 4 September 2019 and 28 December 2019. Further details are available [[Wikipedia:Wiki_Ed/University_of_Wyoming/Architectural_History_(Fall_2019)|on the course page]]. Student editor(s): [[User:Alkahale|Alkahale]]. Peer reviewers: [[User:Lil Beastea|Lil Beastea]], [[User:Cbogart1|Cbogart1]], [[User:Aknoshaug|Aknoshaug]]. {{small|Above undated message substituted from [[Template:Dashboard.wikiedu.org assignment]] by [[User:PrimeBOT|PrimeBOT]] ([[User talk:PrimeBOT|talk]]) 17:33, 16 January 2022 (UTC)}} :Dummy comment added by script to avoid immediate auto-archive of a fresh page.[[User:Immanuelle|Immanuelle]] ([[User talk:Immanuelle|talk]]) 02:59, 26 February 2026 (UTC) == Location == I get that this is in Japan, but where? And, while there are some obvious contextual clues, it doesn't explicitly say it is in Japan until the third section. I feel as though this would all be appropriate information for the first sentence. Thoughts? [[User:CharacterZero|CharacterZero]] | [[User talk:CharacterZero|Speak]] 18:28, 21 September 2007 (UTC) :I added the location to the first sentence. Thanks for your advice. --[[User:Sushiya|Sushiya]] 21:58, 21 September 2007 (UTC) :Dummy comment added by script to avoid immediate auto-archive of a fresh page.[[User:Immanuelle|Immanuelle]] ([[User talk:Immanuelle|talk]]) 02:59, 26 February 2026 (UTC)

{{talk page header}} == Local discussion == :Dummy comment added by script to avoid immediate auto-archive of a fresh page.[[User:Immanuelle|Immanuelle]] ([[User talk:Immanuelle|talk]]) 02:59, 26 February 2026 (UTC) == Imported from Japanese Wikipedia (2026-02-26, [https://ja.wikipedia.org/wiki/Special:PermanentLink/103683478 revision]) == :Dummy comment added by script to avoid immediate auto-archive of a fresh page.[[User:Immanuelle|Immanuelle]] ([[User talk:Immanuelle|talk]]) 02:59, 26 February 2026 (UTC) {{Talkheader}} == 2006年12月 == よく参考にさせていただいており助かっています しかし数字的に迷う部分があります 知恩院の国宝の三門の高さもその一つです　知恩院のホ－ムペ－ジでは24m 当ペ－ジでは34mなどです数字の出所を教えていただきたくおもいます ヨシミズ sysy4432@ybb.ne.jp—''以上のコメントは、220.41.20.87（[[利用者‐会話:220.41.20.87|会話]]/[[特別:投稿記録/220.41.20.87|投稿記録]]/[https://whois.domaintools.com/220.41.20.87 Whois]）さんが[[特別:固定リンク/9279485|2006年12月6日 (水) 01:29 (UTC)]]に投稿したものです（[[User:Keruby|Keruby]]（[[利用者‐会話:Keruby|会話]]）による付記）。'' :誤記の可能性もあるので、公式サイトにあわせて「24m」と修正しました。もし「34m」にも根拠があるようでしたら、「○○から計れば34m」と併記していただければと思います。--[[User:Miya|miya]] 2006年12月6日 (水) 01:46 (UTC) :Dummy comment added by script to avoid immediate auto-archive of a fresh page.[[User:Immanuelle|Immanuelle]] ([[User talk:Immanuelle|talk]]) 02:59, 26 February 2026 (UTC) == 参考資料の明記を == いつも使わしていただいています。 執筆の際の参考資料はどこから出てきているのでしょうか？--[[User:121.82.211.37|121.82.211.37]] 2007年1月26日 (金) 15:34 (UTC)はかせ :Dummy comment added by script to avoid immediate auto-archive of a fresh page.[[User:Immanuelle|Immanuelle]] ([[User talk:Immanuelle|talk]]) 02:59, 26 February 2026 (UTC) == Imported from English Wikipedia (2026-02-26, [https://en.wikipedia.org/wiki/Special:PermanentLink/1206666309 revision]) == :Dummy comment added by script to avoid immediate auto-archive of a fresh page.[[User:Immanuelle|Immanuelle]] ([[User talk:Immanuelle|talk]]) 02:59, 26 February 2026 (UTC) {{WikiProject banner shell|class=Start|1= {{WikiProject Buddhism|importance=low}} {{WikiProject Japan|importance=high|religion=y}} {{WikiProject Architecture|importance=mid}} }} ==Wiki Education Foundation-supported course assignment== [[File:Sciences humaines.svg|40px]] This article was the subject of a Wiki Education Foundation-supported course assignment, between 4 September 2019 and 28 December 2019. Further details are available [[Wikipedia:Wiki_Ed/University_of_Wyoming/Architectural_History_(Fall_2019)|on the course page]]. Student editor(s): [[User:Alkahale|Alkahale]]. Peer reviewers: [[User:Lil Beastea|Lil Beastea]], [[User:Cbogart1|Cbogart1]], [[User:Aknoshaug|Aknoshaug]]. {{small|Above undated message substituted from [[Template:Dashboard.wikiedu.org assignment]] by [[User:PrimeBOT|PrimeBOT]] ([[User talk:PrimeBOT|talk]]) 17:33, 16 January 2022 (UTC)}} :Dummy comment added by script to avoid immediate auto-archive of a fresh page.[[User:Immanuelle|Immanuelle]] ([[User talk:Immanuelle|talk]]) 02:59, 26 February 2026 (UTC) == Location == I get that this is in Japan, but where? And, while there are some obvious contextual clues, it doesn't explicitly say it is in Japan until the third section. I feel as though this would all be appropriate information for the first sentence. Thoughts? [[User:CharacterZero|CharacterZero]] | [[User talk:CharacterZero|Speak]] 18:28, 21 September 2007 (UTC) :I added the location to the first sentence. Thanks for your advice. --[[User:Sushiya|Sushiya]] 21:58, 21 September 2007 (UTC) :Dummy comment added by script to avoid immediate auto-archive of a fresh page.[[User:Immanuelle|Immanuelle]] ([[User talk:Immanuelle|talk]]) 02:59, 26 February 2026 (UTC)

revision.comment: [[Project:History cleanup|Offloading history due to miraheze stability concerns]] previous contributors were [[User:en>Logoshimpo]], [[User:Immanuelle]], [[User:EmmaBot]], see [https://emmaleonhart.github.io/shintowiki-scripts/wikihistory.html?page=Chion-in here] for full history [[github:EmmaLeonhart/shintowiki-scripts/actions/runs/24756154998|commit triggered pipeline]]
revision.text: {{talk page header}} == Local discussion == :Dummy comment added by script to avoid immediate auto-archive of a fresh page.[[User:Immanuelle|Immanuelle]] ([[User talk:Immanuelle|talk]]) しかし数字的に迷う部分があります 知恩院の国宝の三門の高さもその一つです　知恩院のホ－ムペ－ジでは24m 当ペ－ジでは34mなどです数字の出所を教えていただきたくおもいます ヨシミズ course assignment, between 4 September 2019 and 28 December 2019. Further details are available [[Wikipedia:Wiki_Ed/University_of_Wyoming/Architectural_History_(Fall_2019)|on the course page]]. Student editor(s): [[User:Alkahale|Alkahale]]. Peer reviewers: [[User:Lil Beastea|Lil Beastea]], [[User:Cbogart1|Cbogart1]], [[User:Aknoshaug|Aknoshaug]]. {{small|Above undated message substituted from [[Template:Dashboard.wikiedu.org assignment]] by [[User:PrimeBOT|PrimeBOT]] ([[User talk:PrimeBOT|talk]]) 17:33, 16 January 2022 (UTC)}} :Dummy comment added by script to avoid immediate auto-archive of a fresh page.[[User:Immanuelle|Immanuelle]] ([[User talk:Immanuelle|talk]]) 02:59, 26 February 2026 (UTC) == Location == I get that this is in Japan, but where? And, while there are some obvious contextual clues, it doesn't explicitly say it is in Japan until the third section. I feel as though this would all be appropriate information for the first sentence. Thoughts? [[User:CharacterZero|CharacterZero]] | [[User talk:CharacterZero|Speak]] 18:28, 21 September 2007 (UTC) :I added the location to the first sentence. Thanks for your advice. --[[User:Sushiya|Sushiya]] 21:58, 21 September 2007 (UTC) :Dummy comment added by script to avoid immediate auto-archive of a fresh page.[[User:Immanuelle|Immanuelle]] ([[User talk:Immanuelle|talk]]) 02:59, 26 February 2026 (UTC)
